rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:14 69 97 115 101 95 48 49]>Ahhh...<unk[5:0]> Giving the wings a stretch after
a lot of work is the best.

I'm glad I came to this Lurelin place for
a break after all that effort with the
Skyview Towers.
<unk[3:0:261]><unk[4:0:18 87 97 107 101 117 112 95 48 49]>Just take it all in. The smell of the sea...
That fresh scent off the waves...<unk[5:0]> We just
don't have that where we're from.

<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>So true, so true.<unk[5:0]> I find it so...<unk[5:0]>wonderful.


<unk[3:0:264]>Billson,<unk[5:1]> I get the sense that you and I...<unk[5:0]>
we might have a lot in common.
